DEPT 304; JUDGE STUART POLLAK; ROMY BARULICH, CSR; ANDREA CARNEY, CLERK; ASSIGNED FROM DEPT ONE FOR SETTLEMENT CON- FERENCE. CASE SETTLED. LAURA FARVE WILL PAY BACK RENT FOR THE MONTHS OF AUGUST AND SEPT. PLUS FILING FEE FOR A TOTAL OF $1049.00 DUE BY CLOSE OF BUSINESS TODAY, SEPT. 15, 1999. LATE CHARGES TO BE ADDED TO OCTOBER RENT. UPON PAYMENT, ACTION WILL BE DISMISSED. IF PAYMENT IS NOT MADE, PLAINTIFF MAY OBTAIN JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 88 PERRY ST, #209, S.F. 94107. TRIAL DATE OF SEPT. 20, 1999 IS VACATED.
